title: Durability Tweaks (RPG Tweaks)
body:
# Durability Tweaks

Server side mod.

Reduces durability loss of equipment.

## Features

- Armor durability loss chance
- Armor durability loss cap
- Armor durability loss multiplier
- Shield durability loss chance 
- Shield durability loss cap
- Shield durability loss multiplier

## Configuration

Config file is located in `config/durability_tweaks.json`.
